title: Strangling
wikitext:
[]: Strangling!!!             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Mon May 19, 2008 12:13 pm After reading another thread that mentioned strangling, just how many times does strangling occur from beginning to end of the show? There's at least Shinji strangling Asuka x 2, Shinji strangling mini Shinji (think about it . . .), and Naoko strangling Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by Stacifer » Mon May 19, 2008 12:50 pm unit 01 strangling unit 03 and vice versa ;) I know that it doesn't count, but in the manga, Asuka's mother strangling little Asuka, well it's only brief but yup! lol@ Shinji strangling mini Shinji!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon May 19, 2008 1:05 pm And in the manga, again, Asuka strangling Shinji in the hospital scene, plus Ritsuko strangling Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by Stacifer » Mon May 19, 2008 1:21 pm Mr. Tines wrote: And in the manga, again, Asuka strangling Shinji in the hospital scene, plus Ritsuko strangling Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by terminus » Mon May 19, 2008 2:25 pm does Asuka's mom strangling/hanging herself count?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon May 19, 2008 2:41 pm Stacifer wrote: Which volume is that in? I mean Ritsuko strangling Rei?

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Tue May 20, 2008 12:50 am I'm wondering why strangling was relatively commonplace in the series...? Maybe it represented something?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue May 20, 2008 12:55 am Using your hands is the next best thing when you don't have a handy dandy gun at your disposal. Of course strangling would be common. Plus, it represents that brutality of finally being pushed over the edge and losing it.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue May 20, 2008 1:36 am BEsERk EVA01 wrote: Maybe it represented something?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue May 20, 2008 1:49 am ...... Pervert. Also, Kyoko strangled a doll. (Plus she ripped one's head off, and put one on a noose, and...)

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Tue May 20, 2008 1:52 am Eva Yojimbo wrote: BEsERk EVA01 wrote: Maybe it represented something?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue May 20, 2008 4:14 am BEsERk EVA01 wrote: I don't get it. Explain. Well, what's the shape it DOES make that makes appearances relevant to Eva?

[]:             Quote Post by majlund » Tue May 20, 2008 4:23 am Eva Yojimbo wrote: The times we see the open palms is always equated with life - blood from Rei, semen over Asuka, Adam embryo, Lilith & Adam opening their Doors of Guf. Everytime they're closed it's equated with death - the strangulations. Then we see the clenching/unclenching - decision/indecision. Finally, in the finale we see both a strangulation and a caress. It's the final iteration of this whole death, life, despair, hope, choice motif done entirely through the images of hands. Pretty neat, huh?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue May 20, 2008 5:08 am majlund wrote: Very neat. This is indeed the power of a recurring motif in action.

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Tue May 20, 2008 7:17 am Eva Yojimbo wrote: The times we see the open palms is always equated with life - blood from Rei, semen over Asuka, Adam embryo, Lilith & Adam opening their Doors of Guf. Everytime they're closed it's equated with death - the strangulations. Then we see the clenching/unclenching - decision/indecision. Finally, in the finale we see both a strangulation and a caress. It's the final iteration of this whole death, life, despair, hope, choice motif done entirely through the images of hands. Pretty neat, huh?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue May 20, 2008 7:36 am Iron Rooster wrote: You know, in my "How often does Shinji Spank his Monkey" thread, I asked about Shinji's odd hand clasping thing. I guess that's the answer right there.

[]:             Quote Post by terminus » Tue May 20, 2008 2:01 pm Eva Yojimbo wrote: majlund wrote: Very neat. This is indeed the power of a recurring motif in action.

[]:             Quote Post by cyharding » Tue May 20, 2008 2:48 pm Mr. Tines wrote: And in the manga, again, Asuka strangling Shinji in the hospital scene

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Tue May 20, 2008 9:16 pm Bardiel

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Tue May 20, 2008 9:29 pm Stacifer wrote: unit 01 strangling unit 03 and vice versa ;) I know that it doesn't count, but in the manga, Asuka's mother strangling little Asuka, well it's only brief but yup! lol@ Shinji strangling mini Shinji!!!

Article: Strangling
 The times we see the open palms is always equated with life - blood from Rei, semen over Asuka, Adam embryo, Lilith & Adam opening their Doors of Guf. Everytime they're closed it's equated with death - the strangulations. Then we see the clenching/unclenching - decision/indecision. Finally, in the finale we see both a strangulation and a caress. It's the final iteration of this whole death, life, despair, hope, choice motif done entirely through the images of hands. Pretty neat, huh?
